summary: Full frontend regression + new PDI extensions passed. Verified Template Library (120 badge, search, 3-tab preview with Original PDF/Extracted rows/Live Sample PDF iframe, activate/deactivate toggle flips badge, edit->new revision toast, revisions dialog lists Rev N + CURRENT badge, mapped_parts restored). Upload flow end-to-end: PDF file → progress → Gemini OCR draft appeared in ~30s → Review&Save opened editor prefilled → SAVED badge → new 'UI TEST TEMPLATE' appeared in library → deleted via trash button + confirm; library returned to 120. Generate: search '1032' surfaces chip, click auto-populated report_date=11.07.2026, lot_size=1000, challan='26-27/1032 / 11.07.2026', vendor_code=302235, template=Dowel Pin rev 4 with 5 dimensions. Lot No was a plain input (no packing slips). Inspector/Approver radix selects work. Generate created PDI-0007 with preview iframe. Reports tab now has Inspector/Approver/Rev columns; UI-LOT-1 row shows Ramesh Kumar / S. Grewal / r4 / GENERATED. Settings > Masters: add + rename (pencil) + toggle deactivate flows all functional; deactivated inspector no longer appears in Generate dropdown (options=2, correct). Regression: Reports dashboard (Pending/Completed PDI) loads, Packing Slip Studio loads.

integration_issues.flow: Template Library totals badge after upload SAVED
integration_issues.issue: '120 templates' badge did not refresh to 121 immediately after Review & Save + Done; search still surfaces the newly uploaded row, so it is a stale-count issue only. After delete it returns to 120 correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: TemplateLibrary: consider invalidating the templates query on UploadDialog close (or on draft save) — currently the total-badge count can stay stale until next page navigation.

PDI toggle-activate creates a new revision on every flip. Verified GUIDE PIN jumped from rev 1 → rev 5 after two toggles + two edits, which may inflate revision history for regulatory audit trails. Consider only bumping revision on 'meaningful' field changes.
RevisionsDialog dialog description slot missing (aria-describedby) — DialogContent shows Radix warning.

success_rate.backend: not tested this iteration (13/13 last run)

seed_data_creation: Deactivated 'UI Test Inspector 2' inspector master left in inactive state as per instructions. All test templates + generated report artifacts either cleaned up (UI TEST TEMPLATE deleted, GUIDE PIN mapped_parts restored to empty) or left as harmless history (PDI-0007 for lot UI-LOT-1 remains).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dispatch chip testid pdi-pick-item-* text is only the item line ('1968889 · qty 1000') — invoice number is on the parent card. Use pdi-dispatch-search to filter by invoice. Toggling template active/inactive creates a new revision. Master Inspector radix select must be opened with click on trigger before [role='option'] shows up. GUIDE PIN is at rev 5 now; Dowel Pin at rev 4.
rca of the issue: Stale library total badge: TemplateLibrary component holds its own count state seeded from initial fetch; UploadTemplateDialog Save posts to /api/pdi/templates but only the drafts list within the dialog is refreshed. On dialog close/Done, parent doesn't invalidate the templates react-query cache → badge remains 120. Fix: call queryClient.invalidateQueries(['pdi','templates']) inside UploadDialog onSave success handler or when dialog closes with any saved drafts.
